title: Bug-Fix Learning Loop
description: Fix a production bug the disciplined way, then teach the codebase what was learned. Faithful lift of Jesse Vincent's 'superpowers' skill library (obra/superpowers, MIT): systematic-debugging's Iron Law and Four Phases (root-cause investigation → pattern analysis → hypothesis & testing → implementation) drive the diagnosis; test-driven-development supplies the RED→GREEN→REFACTOR fix loop under subagent-driven-development's two-stage (spec then quality) review; requesting/receiving-code-review, verification-before-completion, and finishing-a-development-branch close the work. The GROW loop is explicit: every step keeps a memory.md, and a terminal writing-skills node distills this run's learning into a NEW skill written back to the library while memory_writeback records the codebase-specific gotcha — so the same trace, re-run, sharpens.

bug_report.name: Bug Report
bug_report.does: Read the incoming bug report; extract symptom, stack trace, and repro rate.

triage_priority.name: Triage & Priority
triage_priority.does: Classify severity, blast radius, and priority; decide systematic debugging is required.

reproduce.name: Reproduce Consistently
reproduce.does: Phase 1: build a reliable reproduction; read the error carefully; measure the repro rate.

gather_evidence.name: Gather Evidence
gather_evidence.does: Phase 1: instrument every component boundary; run once; capture which layer breaks.

pattern_analysis.name: Pattern Analysis
pattern_analysis.does: Phase 2: find working examples, compare against the broken path, list every difference.

hypothesize.name: Form Hypothesis
hypothesize.does: Phase 3: state ONE specific root-cause hypothesis grounded in the evidence.

test_hypothesis.name: Test Hypothesis
test_hypothesis.does: Phase 3: test minimally, one variable; trace the bad value backward to its source.

root_cause.name: Root Cause
root_cause.does: Confirmed root cause at the source (not the symptom); the Iron Law is satisfied.

fix_design.name: Fix Design
fix_design.does: Design the source fix plus defense-in-depth layers before writing any code.

implement_tdd.name: Implement (TDD)
implement_tdd.does: RED → GREEN → REFACTOR: failing regression test first, minimal fix, then clean up.

review_spec.name: Spec Review
review_spec.does: Stage 1 review: does the diff match the fix design — nothing missing, nothing extra?

review_quality.name: Quality Review
review_quality.does: Stage 2 review: code quality, naming, coupling — only after spec review is green.

code_review.name: Code Review
code_review.does: Fan-in both review stages; evaluate each finding technically and act on it.

verify_completion.name: Verify Completion
verify_completion.does: Run the full suite fresh; confirm red→green and zero regressions before any claim.

finish_branch.name: Finish Branch
finish_branch.does: Tests pass: present integration options and open the PR with summary + test plan.

writing_skills.name: Writing Skills
writing_skills.does: Distill this run's learning into a NEW reusable skill written back to the library.

memory_writeback.name: Memory Writeback
memory_writeback.does: Record the codebase-specific gotcha in memory.md so the next run skips this dead-end.

deliverable.description: A root-caused, test-backed fix for the reported bug (fix_summary.md + root_cause.json), plus the GROW artifacts: a new reusable skill written back to the library (new_skill.md) and the codebase-specific gotcha recorded in memory.md so the same trace sharpens on the next run.
